vocab.example: My history teacher was a fountain of knowledge who could answer even the most obscure questions.

vocab.meaning: thấm nhuần/khơi dậy cảm giác về...
vocab.example: She managed to instil a sense of confidence in me that I never knew I had.
He would radiate enthusiasm in every lecture, making even the driest subjects fascinating.

vocab.meaning: nhận được sự tôn trọng (một cách tự nhiên)
vocab.example: She didn't need to shout; her sheer expertise and presence allowed her to command respect effortlessly.

vocab.meaning: để lại ấn tượng sâu sắc/lâu dài
vocab.example: Her unique teaching philosophy left a lasting impression on my personal development.
Although he was a stern disciplinarian, we all loved him because he was incredibly fair.

vocab.meaning: khơi dậy niềm yêu thích/hứng thú
vocab.example: It was my physics teacher who truly ignited my interest in the wonders of the universe.

vocab.meaning: vượt xa trách nhiệm/mong đợi (để giúp đỡ)
vocab.example: She often went beyond the call of duty to provide extra tutoring for students who were struggling.

vocab.meaning: người biết lắng nghe và thấu cảm
vocab.example: Beyond academics, she was an empathetic listener whenever I faced personal challenges at school.

vocab.meaning: hình thành thế giới quan của ai đó
vocab.example: My literature teacher significantly helped shape my worldview through the diverse books we discussed.
